languages.text: [draft] ужасный запах, эти гвардейцы не смогли выбраться из грузового контенера

traits.locale_text: [draft] ужасный запах, эти гвардейцы не смогли выбраться из грузового контенера

languages.text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.
languages.original_text: От контейнера тяжело пахнет смертью. Судя по маркировкам, в нем перевозили гвардейцев. Судя по вмятинам, выбраться им не удалось.

traits.locale_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

languages.text: От контейнера тяжело пахнет смертью. Судя по маркировкам, в нем перевозили гвардейцев. Судя по вмятинам, выбраться им не удалось.
El fuerte olor de la muerte surge del contenedor. A juzgar por sus marcas, se usó para transportar a soldados de la Guardia. A juzgar por sus abolladuras, nunca consiguieron salir de él.
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

traits.locale_text: El fuerte olor de la muerte surge del contenedor. A juzgar por sus marcas, se usó para transportar a soldados de la Guardia. A juzgar por sus abolladuras, nunca consiguieron salir de él.

languages.text: 集装箱里散发着浓烈的尸臭。从集装箱的标记来看，它应该是用来运送帝国卫队士兵的，但从集装箱上的凹痕判断，这些人全都死在了里面。
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

traits.locale_text: 集装箱里散发着浓烈的尸臭。从集装箱的标记来看，它应该是用来运送帝国卫队士兵的，但从集装箱上的凹痕判断，这些人全都死在了里面。

languages.text: 死体のひどい腐敗臭がコンテナから広がる。その印から判断するに、それはガーズマンたちを輸送するために使用された。そのへこみから判断するに、それができなかった。
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

traits.locale_text: 死体のひどい腐敗臭がコンテナから広がる。その印から判断するに、それはガーズマンたちを輸送するために使用された。そのへこみから判断するに、それができなかった。

languages.text: Der schwere Geruch von Tod dringt aus dem Container nach außen. Den Markierungen zufolge diente er dem Transport von Gardisten. Und den Spuren zufolge kamen sie nicht heraus.
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

traits.locale_text: Der schwere Geruch von Tod dringt aus dem Container nach außen. Den Markierungen zufolge diente er dem Transport von Gardisten. Und den Spuren zufolge kamen sie nicht heraus.

languages.text: Du conteneur s'échappe la puanteur accablante de la mort. À en juger par les inscriptions, il servait au transport de gardes. Et à en juger par les dégâts apparents, ils ne s'en sont pas sortis.
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.

traits.locale_text: Du conteneur s'échappe la puanteur accablante de la mort. À en juger par les inscriptions, il servait au transport de gardes. Et à en juger par les dégâts apparents, ils ne s'en sont pas sortis.

languages.text: Konteynerden ağır bir ölüm kokusu yayılıyor. Üzerindeki işaretlere bakılırsa Muhafız nakliyatında kullanılmış. Ezikler, içeridekilerin dışarı çıkmayı başaramadığını gösteriyor.
languages.original_text: A heavy stench of death spreads from the container. Judging by the markings, it was used for transporting Guardsmen. Judging by the dents, they did not make it out.
